text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Health week at the dorms is coming up fast... That
means they'll be patrolling for people staying up
too late.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
They want everyone to be good and sleep at
beddy time? What a load... We decide what's
healthy for us.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I completely agree... But this time they're doling
out punishments.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Anyone they catch gets put on special
groundskeeping duty for a week.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That means one measly round of late-night poker
will net us a whole lot of time together—doing
hard labor.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you're going to play "good girl" with your tail
between your legs? ...I know you won't,
Nakayama.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Course not... Poker's even better when our dorm
leader could catch us at any moment. I'd never
miss out on that kind of adrenaline rush.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were cool. You're too messed up to
ever put on the brakes.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I don't have brakes to begin with. The gas
pedal's all you need for a game!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah, Nakayama! Having you makes me glad
I'm not stuck with some boring roommate!
